row-title.purpose: Catalog and shopping item names — body, bold when pill expanded.

row-quantity.purpose: Store trailing quantity — body bold monospaced digits.

shadows.name: quantity-pill
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow on Home quantity pill capsule (light mode).

motion.name: pill-expand-collapse
motion.purpose: Quantity pill expand/collapse and matching row gutter animation.

motion.name: list-mutation
motion.purpose: Check-off, clear, undo, and section collapse list updates.

motion.name: tap-pulse
motion.purpose: Pill +/- tap feedback; not used on remove-at-qty-1.

components.name: Store Group Header
components.description: Collapsible store section title with chevron and optional unchecked count.
components.css: .ds-group-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 0 16px 6px; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #474747; text-align: left; min-height: 44px; } .ds-group-header:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-group-header:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #007AFF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-group-header--dimmed { color: #B8B8B8; } .ds-group-header__chevron { font-size: 20px; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Quantity Pill (collapsed)
components.description: Home/Store expandable quantity control — collapsed state.
components.css: .ds-qty-pill { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #007AFF; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 16px; min-width: 44px; min-height: 32px; box-shadow: 0 1.5px 2.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-qty-pill:hover { transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-qty-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #007AFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Shopping List Row
components.description: Plain list row with checkbox and item name.
components.css: .ds-list-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 44px; background: #FFFFFF; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; color: #000000; } .ds-list-row__check { color: #007AFF; font-size: 22px; width: 22px; text-align: center; } .ds-list-row__title { flex: 1; }

components.name: Toolbar Done
components.css: .ds-btn-done { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #007AFF; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 8px 12px; min-height: 44px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-done:hover { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-btn-done:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #007AFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Home Section Tab (active)
components.description: Active section in Home horizontal title bar.
components.css: .ds-section-tab { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 10px 0; cursor: pointer; color: #C7C7CC; min-height: 44px; } .ds-section-tab--active { color: #000000; } .ds-section-tab:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-section-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #007AFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Shoplister looks and behaves like a first-party iOS utility: plain lists, system navigation, semantic labels, and a single user-chosen accent that marks interactive quantity and selection chrome—not decorative marketing color. Depth comes from separators, label hierarchy, and one restrained shadow on the quantity pill—not layered cards or glassmorphism for its own sake.
keyCharacteristics: Semantic surfaces adapt to light, dark, and increased contrast
One accent voice on controls and quantities only
List-first layout with shared title3.heavy group headers
Quiet completion via dimmed all-checked section titles
Motion with restraint; Reduce Motion honored

rules.name: The One Tint Rule
rules.body: The accent color appears on controls and quantities, not on list backgrounds or section fills.

rules.name: The Semantic Label Rule
rules.body: Prefer UIColor label hierarchy over hard-coded grays except where store headers are tuned for light-mode legibility.

rules.name: The Dynamic Type Rule
rules.body: Row height and spacing scale via AppTextSize.listSpacingScale (0.8–1.2).

rules.name: The Flat List Rule
rules.body: No card containers for standard catalog or shopping rows.

rules.name: The Resting Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear on the quantity pill capsule only.

dos: Do use system semantic colors and Dynamic Type for all new screens.
Do apply the user accent tint only to interactive emphasis.
Do dim completed store section titles when every row is checked.
Do mirror layout for Hebrew RTL.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboards, card-heavy admin UIs, or marketing landing-page patterns inside the app shell.
Don't port web navigation or non-system controls.
Don't use AI-default visual tropes: cream/sand backgrounds, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, identical card grids, uppercase tracked eyebrows.
Don't use over-animation or bounce-heavy motion that fights iOS transitions.
Don't clutter the Store list—checking items and quantities stay primary.
Don't splash accent color across full-screen backgrounds.
